name: Magic Bake-Off
overview: Splitting the kids between the ages of 6 and 14 into three teams of two, having them race against the clock to design a Disney-inspired cake, utilizing Tastemade's signature recipe videos and "an enchanted pantry" full of ingredient.

trailers.title: Issac Ryan Brown and Dara Renee Bake Some Disney Magic | Disney's Magic Bake-Off | Disney Channel
